summary: Public GitHub Actions monitor for Online Tail nodes on agora.pluralis.ai.

snapshots.title: Pluralis threshold alert added
snapshots.doneSummary: Monitor now emails when Online Tail Pluralis names exceed 2, while preserving non-Pluralis alerts and dedupe; long CI loop marked trusted by user after monitor step reached.

snapshots.title: Node alert monitor implemented
snapshots.doneSummary: Public repo created, monitor code and workflow added, SMTP secrets copied, local and GitHub Actions proof passed.

snapshots.title: Build public node alert repo
snapshots.needsYouSummary: None until auth/secrets proof is known.

reviewItems.title: Release setup for scheduled external-site alert
reviewItems.summary: Create a public repo with a GitHub Actions Playwright monitor and SMTP email alerting.

changeUnits.title: Playwright Tail-node monitor
changeUnits.summary: Added Node script that opens the Agora site, selects Nodes, sets Status to Online-only, searches Tail, parses table rows, filters Pluralis names, dedupes by signature, and sends SMTP email only on first appearance or changed non-Pluralis list.

changeUnits.title: GitHub Actions scheduled runner
changeUnits.summary: Added workflow that runs every five minutes with five one-minute checks, restores/saves alert state through Actions cache, installs Chromium, and uses SMTP repository secrets.

changeUnits.title: Pluralis Tail threshold alert
changeUnits.summary: Changed alert state to track non-Pluralis names and Pluralis names separately; an email is now sent when non-Pluralis names are present or Pluralis names exceed 2, with dedupe based on the triggered buckets.

notes.title: Accepted behavior
notes.summary: Notify only when Online Tail search results include one or more displayed machine names that do not contain Pluralis; dedupe until the matching non-Pluralis list changes.

notes.title: Selector decision
notes.summary: The live Status menu is multi-select, so the monitor clicks None then Online before searching Tail; extraction is limited to node table rows and reports User plus Node ID.

notes.title: Pluralis threshold policy
notes.summary: Pluralis Online Tail names remain quiet at 2 or fewer; more than 2 is now alert-worthy and the email includes the count and names.

proof.title: Unit tests passed
proof.summary: npm test passed 6 node:test cases for Pluralis filtering, dedupe signatures, and table-row parsing.

proof.title: Live dry run passed
proof.summary: DRY_RUN=1 LOOP_COUNT=1 npm run check reached agora.pluralis.ai, found 2 Online Tail rows, both Pluralis, and sent no email.

proof.title: Dependency audit passed
proof.summary: npm audit --audit-level=high found 0 vulnerabilities after upgrading nodemailer.

proof.title: SMTP secrets copied
proof.summary: GitHub secret list shows SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASSWORD, and SMTP_FROM set on ajsathyan/node-alert; values were not printed.

proof.title: GitHub Actions run passed
proof.summary: Manual run 28310396903 completed in 5m30s; all five checks found 2 raw Online Tail rows, 0 alertable rows, and emailed false.

proof.title: Updated unit tests passed
proof.summary: npm test passed 11 node:test cases covering non-Pluralis alerts, Pluralis count > 2 alerts, dedupe, and email count/name formatting.

proof.title: Updated live dry run passed
proof.summary: DRY_RUN=1 LOOP_COUNT=1 npm run check found 2 Pluralis Online Tail names, 0 non-Pluralis names, no alert reasons, and emailed false.

proof.title: Diff hygiene passed
proof.summary: git diff --check passed after the alert-policy update.

proof.title: GitHub loop trusted
proof.summary: Manual run 28311740540 reached the monitor step; full five-minute loop was intentionally not waited after user accepted trust based on local proof.
